item.title: Anthropic 保密提交 IPO 文件，抢先 OpenAI 上市
item.guid: Anthropic-保密提交-IPO-文件，抢先-OpenAI-上市
item.description:
据彭博社报道，Anthropic 已于当地时间周一向美国监管机构保密提交 IPO 文件，计划最早于今年秋季完成 IPO，有望抢先竞争对手 OpenAI 登陆华尔街。

Anthropic 目前估值约 9650 亿美元，若顺利上市，可能成为 AI 公司中规模最大的公开市场首秀之一。公司此前披露的年化收入已达到 470 亿美元，但云计算支出和员工规模也让其继续处于高投入状态。

OpenAI 方面，其 CEO 山姆·奥特曼昨日在接受 CNBC 采访时淡化了两家公司之间的 IPO 竞争，称「会在合适时机推进」。据彭博社此前报道，OpenAI 也正准备在未来数周内秘密提交 IPO 文件，目标同样是在今年秋季完成上市。

item.title: OpenAI 官宣造机器人，Robotics 部门招聘扩大
item.guid: OpenAI-官宣造机器人，Robotics-部门招聘扩大
item.description:
OpenAI CEO Sam Altman 昨日在 X 表示，OpenAI Robotics 正在招聘全栈硬件、运营、系统和机器学习工程师，目标是帮助团队「编程并制造对社会有用的机器人」。

这条招聘信息确认，OpenAI 已把过去一年由 Aditya Ramesh 领导的世界模拟研究项目，发展为 OpenAI Robotics。

Altman 称，AI 应当能在物理世界帮助人类；短期内，OpenAI 会聚焦能支持技术工人建设未来基础设施的机器人，长期设想则是「每个人都拥有一个可完成所需任务的个人机器人」。

他还表示，项目进展很快，基础是机器人硬件与机器学习研究之间的协同设计。

item.title: 车企交出 5 月销量成绩单
item.guid: 车企交出-5-月销量成绩单
item.description:
多家车企昨日公布 2026 年 5 月交付数据：

  • 蔚来 5 月交付新车 37705 台，同比增长 62.3%，环比增长 28.4%；
  • 小鹏 5 月交付新车 32158 台，环比增长 4%；
  • 理想汽车 5 月交付 33350 台；
  • 小米汽车 5 月交付量再超 3 万台；
  • 赛力斯新能源 5 月销量 33476 台；1-5 月累计销量 145108 台，同比增长 15.14%；
  • 问界汽车全系车型 5 月交付 34320 台，环比增长 48.2%。1-5 月累计同比增长 28.7%；
  • 比亚迪汽车 5 月销量 383453 台，同比增长 0.26%；
  • 吉利汽车 5 月汽车销量 237637 台，同比增长 1%；
  • 阿维塔 5 月交付量为 7336 辆；
  • 长城汽车 5 月销量 100399 台，同比下降 1.79%；
  • 奇瑞集团 5 月销售 247823 台，同比增长 20.5%；
  • 北汽新能源 5 月销量 21871 台，同比增长 27.75%。享界汽车 5 月销量 3418 台；极狐汽车 5 月销量 17943 台，同比增长 32.82%；
  • 岚图汽车 5 月交付 13003 台，同比增长 30%；2026 年 1-5 月累计交付 62041 台，同比增长 35%；
  • 奕派科技 5 月交付 24830 台，同比增长 42%，年累计交付 10.96 万台；
  • 广汽昊铂埃安 BU 的 5 月销量 33140 台，同比增长 23.76%；
  • 上汽集团 5 月整车销量 34.9 万台，同比下降 4.62%；
  • 东风本田 5 月销量 18563 台，环比增长 20%；
  • 零跑 5 月交付量达 81569 台：同比增长 81%；
  • 极氪汽车 5 月交付新车 34377 台，同比增长 81.8%，「量价齐升」再创新高，连续四个月同环比双增长；
  • 上汽通用五菱 5 月全球销量 126087 台，华境 S 上市三周交付 3603 台；
  • 智己汽车 5 月交付 10023 台，1-5 月销量同比大涨 115%；
  • 鸿蒙智行 5 月交付 46122 台，环比增长 41%；
  • 极石汽车 5 月交付 2052 台：销量同比增长 66%，2026 年目标全球 3 万台。

item.title: 天涯社区停服三年重启，首日服务器被挤爆
item.guid: 天涯社区停服三年重启，首日服务器被挤爆
item.description:
停服三年的天涯社区昨日零时重启，启用新域名 tianya.net，但服务器随即被涌入的老用户「挤爆」，大量用户反映新域名无法打开，少数进入者也遭遇严重卡顿。

天涯社区客服回应称，访问人数剧增导致卡顿，建议多试几次。目前网页版仅支持浏览部分帖子，老账号 ID 暂不可登录，互动功能计划在 6 月内逐步恢复，App 仍在开发中。

天涯社区创立于 1999 年，注册用户曾超 1.3 亿，月覆盖用户超 2.5 亿，曾被称为「中文网络第一社区」。2023 年 4 月因电信 IDC 欠费停服，同年 5 月再度确认因资金困难关闭。

此后重启团队持续自救，今年 2 月确立恢复方案，并通过众筹「创世成员」（1999 元 / 份，限 9999 份）筹集运营资金。

item.title: 曝豆包 6 月下旬上线付费版
item.guid: 曝豆包-6-月下旬上线付费版
item.description:
据 36 氪消息，豆包预计将在 6 月下旬正式上线付费内容，并在同期 Force 大会上更新相关功能。知情人士称，选择这一时间点，是因为 PC 端与移动端仍需约一个月完成基础功能和收费体系适配。

豆包此前已在 App Store 页面出现付费版本服务声明，显示将在免费版基础上推出标准版、加强版、专业版三档订阅：标准版连续包月 68 元、连续包年 688 元；加强版连续包月 200 元、连续包年 2048 元；专业版连续包月 500 元、连续包年 5088 元。

报道还称，豆包三季度会进一步结合电商功能完善付费场景，并通过补贴为抖音商城引流，四季度进入运行期。字节今年不会把付费用户渗透率作为豆包考核指标，重点仍是把 AI 服务和抖音电商、本地商业化入口打通。

item.title: 英伟达 Vera Rubin 进入量产，面向智能体 AI 工厂
item.guid: 英伟达-Vera-Rubin-进入量产，面向智能体-AI-工厂
item.description:
英伟达昨日宣布，下一代 Vera Rubin 平台已经进入全面量产阶段，面向长上下文、多步推理和 Agentic AI 工厂部署。官方信息显示，Vera Rubin 是一套机架级系统，包含 Vera CPU、Rubin GPU、NVLink 6、ConnectX-9、BlueField-4 和 Spectrum-6 Ethernet 等组件。

Vera Rubin NVL72 由 72 个 Rubin GPU 和 36 个 Vera CPU 组成。英伟达称，相比 Blackwell，Rubin 平台可将推理 token 成本最高降低 10 倍，并用 4 倍更少 GPU 训练 MoE 模型；

Rubin GPU 提供 50 petaflops NVFP4 推理算力，Vera CPU 则采用 88 个 Olympus CPU 核心，面向大规模 AI 工厂的主机侧调度和数据搬运。

英伟达还公布了首批生态名单。OpenAI、Anthropic、Meta、Mistral AI、Perplexity、Runway、xAI 等 AI 实验室将使用 Rubin 平台训练更大模型和服务长上下文、多模态系统；

AWS、Google Cloud、微软和 Oracle Cloud 计划在 2026 年部署 Vera Rubin 实例，微软还将把 Vera Rubin NVL72 用于下一代 Fairwater AI superfactory。

item.title: SK 海力士清州工厂发生火灾，官方称未影响生产
item.guid: SK-海力士清州工厂发生火灾，官方称未影响生产
item.description:
SK 海力士韩国清州工厂当地时间 6 月 1 日 10 时 32 分左右发生火情，起火点位于清州第四厂区 M15 与 M15X 晶圆厂相连的六楼气体机房。厂区自动喷淋系统启动后，明火很快被控制。

火灾过程中出现少量氟气泄漏，工厂组织约 3600 名人员撤离，并将附近员工送至厂区医疗中心检查。SK 海力士称，相关人员身体检查结果正常，事件未造成人员伤亡，半导体核心生产线也未受影响。

公司随后启用环境净化设备处理残留气体，并在当地时间 13 时 38 分左右完成清除工作，重新开放全部工厂建筑。SK 海力士表示，目前设备运行正常，生产未中断，事故原因仍在调查中。

item.title: 赛力斯 × 豆包首车预计年内推出，或采用纯电和增程双动力
item.guid: 赛力斯-×-豆包首车预计年内推出，或采用纯电和增程双动力
item.description:
界面新闻援引蓝鲸汽车报道称，赛力斯与字节跳动旗下火山引擎深度合作的新汽车品牌正在推进首款车型，预计今年内推出。知情人士称，该车可能是一款跨界车，介于 SUV 和轿车之间，并计划同时提供纯电和增程两种动力形式。

报道称，这款车预计将在赛力斯凤凰工厂生产，相关工厂目前已处于改线阶段。赛豆科技车型主要与火山引擎合作车机交互大模型等能力，双方会定期交流；智驾方案预计不会采用华为乾崑。

早前《晚点 Auto》曾报道，赛力斯原控股的蓝电科技已更名为赛豆科技，第一大股东变更为重庆沙坪坝国资委控股公司，赛力斯持股比例降至 32.5%。

item.title: 上海、四川试点无人机「扫码飞」
item.guid: 上海、四川试点无人机「扫码飞」
item.description:
央视新闻报道，中央空管办会同国家发展改革委、公安部、中国民航局等部门，在上海市、四川省无人机管制空域内划设固定专用空域，推广「政府协同管理、行业指导监管、用户随报随飞」模式，也就是「扫码飞」。

这一服务面向公众低空飞行场景，主要提供四项能力：

  • 一是一键查询，实时展示所在位置空域性质，清晰标注可飞区域范围；
  • 二是一键报备，扫描无人机机身码、选取飞行时段即可完成申报，全程仅需2分钟左右；
  • 三是一键导航，精准指引前往热门合规飞行区的路线；
  • 四是一键投保，支持用户线上自主选购第三者责任险，即时生效。

中央空管办有关负责人称，上海在景区开辟专用空域，四川以「低空 + 文旅」融合探索公众低空活动服务。官方口径强调，推广前提仍是航空安全、公共安全和国家安全。

item.title: 闲鱼回应 AI 误把文物照片上架
item.guid: 闲鱼回应-AI-误把文物照片上架
item.description:
第一财经和鞭牛士报道，近日有用户反映，自己的闲鱼账号将一张陕西历史博物馆「鎏金舞马衔杯纹银壶」照片生成商品并标价 6000 元，商品标题、描述和定价均由平台 AI 生成，自己是在被买家咨询后才发现相关商品出现在账号待售主页。

闲鱼方面昨日发表致歉，回应称，经核查，相关商品系 AI 将图片识别为普通文玩商品，并生成建议标题、描述等信息，相关链接已由用户主动下架。平台表示将加强商品上架提醒和用户确认，避免类似误会再次发生。

客服说明把争议指向「闲鱼空间」：通过闲鱼相机发布的照片和商品信息会进入该区域，空间商品上传时默认公开可见，可能被推荐到首页或搜索结果中。多名用户随后反馈，礼服、宠物、包袋等照片也曾被识别成商品。

item.title: 宇树科创板 IPO 过会，计划募资 42 亿元
item.guid: 宇树科创板-IPO-过会，计划募资-42-亿元
item.description:
According to Caixin, Unitree Robotics' STAR Market IPO application has been approved by the Shanghai Stock Exchange Listing Committee, with plans to raise 4.2 billion yuan. Prospectus materials show that Unitree primarily deals in quadruped robots, humanoid robots, and related components, with products covering consumer, industrial, and research and education scenarios. 据财新报道，宇树科技科创板 IPO 申请已获上交所上市委会议审议通过，计划募资 42 亿元。招股材料显示，宇树主营四足机器人、人形机器人和相关零部件，产品覆盖消费级、行业级和科研教育场景。

Unitree disclosed in this round of application that the raised funds will be invested in projects such as high-performance robot R&D, intelligent manufacturing base construction, and sales and service network upgrades. In recent years, the company has gained significant attention due to its quadruped robot products and humanoid robot demonstrations. NVIDIA also showcased a humanoid robot reference design combining with Unitree's body during COMPUTEX. 宇树在本轮申报中披露，募集资金将投向高性能机器人研发、智能制造基地建设、销售和服务网络升级等项目。公司近年因四足机器人产品和人形机器人演示获得较高关注，英伟达在 COMPUTEX 期间也展示了与宇树本体结合的人形机器人参考设计。

item.title: 智谱启动 A 股上市计划，募资 150 亿元押注通用大模型
item.guid: 智谱启动-A-股上市计划，募资-150-亿元押注通用大模型
item.description:
Zhipu announced last night that it plans to apply for an initial public offering of A-shares and list on the STAR Market. According to the announcement, the number of shares to be issued will account for 2% to 8% of the total share capital after the issuance, which is no less than 9.099 million shares and no more than 38.769 million new A-shares, with a total fundraising amount of 15 billion RMB. 智谱昨日晚间发布公告，宣布拟申请首次公开发行 A 股并在科创板上市。根据公告，此次发行数量占发行后总股本的 2% 至 8%，即不少于 909.9 万股、不多于 3876.9 万股新 A 股，募集资金总额为 150 亿元人民币。

The raised funds will primarily be invested in three areas: 12 billion yuan for the R&D of general AI foundation models, 2 billion yuan for the construction of a one-stop MaaS service platform for large models, and another 1 billion yuan for supplementing working capital. 募集资金将主要投向三个方向：120 亿元用于人工智能通用基座大模型研发，20 亿元用于大模型 MaaS 一站式服务平台建设，另有 10 亿元用于补充流动资金。

Zhipu stated in the announcement that this STAR Market listing aims to establish an 'A+H' dual listing platform, broaden financing channels, and advance the R&D and commercialization process of large models. The company also cautioned that it does not guarantee the final completion of the offering, and investors should exercise prudence. 智谱在公告中表示，此次科创板上市旨在建立「A+H」双重上市平台，拓宽融资渠道，推进大模型研发与商业化进程。公司同时提示，不保证发行最终成行，投资者需审慎对待。

item.title: 美团一季度营收 910.4 亿元，录得 68.3 亿元亏损
item.guid: 美团一季度营收-910.4-亿元，录得-68.3-亿元亏损
item.description:
Meituan disclosed its Q1 2026 financial results yesterday on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. Revenue for the period was 91.04 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 5.6%; operating loss was 6.47 billion yuan, compared to an operating profit of 10.57 billion yuan in the same period last year; net loss for the period was 6.83 billion yuan, compared to a profit of 10.06 billion yuan in the same period last year. 美团昨日在港交所披露 2026 年第一季度业绩，期内收入 910.4 亿元，同比增长 5.6%；经营亏损 64.7 亿元，去年同期经营利润为 105.7 亿元；期内亏损 68.3 亿元，去年同期利润为 100.6 亿元。

By business segment, core local commerce revenue was 64.06 billion yuan, largely flat year-on-year, with an operating loss of 2.03 billion yuan; new initiatives revenue was 26.98 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 21.3%, with an operating loss of 2.12 billion yuan. The company stated that intensified industry competition put pressure on profitability, but losses from instant delivery services significantly decreased quarter-on-quarter. 分业务看，核心本地商业收入 640.6 亿元，同比基本持平，经营亏损 20.3 亿元；新业务收入 269.8 亿元，同比增长 21.3%，经营亏损 21.2 亿元。公司称，行业竞争加剧对盈利能力造成压力，但即时配送业务亏损环比大幅减少。

Meituan adjusted its revenue reporting method this quarter, separately disclosing product sales revenue, which mainly corresponds to self-operated categories such as Xiaoxiang Supermarket, Kuaile驢, and pharmaceuticals and alcohol; commission revenue and online marketing service revenue were merged into merchant services revenue. 美团本季度调整了收入呈报方式，将商品销售收入单独披露，主要对应小象超市、快驴以及药品、酒类等自营品类；佣金收入和在线营销服务收入则合并为商家服务收入。

item.title: 💡 黄仁勋：AI 抢走工作是胡说八道
item.guid: 💡-黄仁勋：AI-抢走工作是胡说八道
item.description:
NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang responded to the AI employment controversy in his GTC Taipei keynote speech yesterday, stating bluntly that 'AI reduces jobs' is nonsense, and the reality is that the number of software engineers is increasing. 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋昨日在 GTC Taipei 主题演讲中回应 AI 就业争议，直言「AI 减少岗位」是胡说八道，实际情况是软件工程师数量正在增加。

He referred to the current stage as the era of 'useful AI,' believing that tokens have become a profitable revenue unit, and AI is becoming a GDP generator. 他把当前阶段称为「有用的 AI」时代，认为 token 已经成为获利的营收单位，AI 正在变成 GDP 的生成器。

Huang explained the meaning behind these figures with an economic calculation. There are approximately 30 to 40 million professional software developers globally, with a total annual compensation of about $3 trillion, supporting the operation of a global industry worth about $100 trillion. 黄仁勋用一笔经济账解释这组数据背后的含义。全球约 3000 万至 4000 万名专业软件开发者，年薪酬总额约 3 万亿美元，支撑着全球约 100 万亿美元产业的运转。

A threefold increase in output means that these developers are creating approximately $9 trillion in productivity with $3 trillion in compensation. He concluded that when an engineer's output doubles, it becomes more cost-effective to hire more engineers. 产出三倍增长意味着，这些开发者正以 3 万亿美元的薪酬创造出约 9 万亿美元的生产力。他由此得出结论：当一名工程师的产出倍增，雇佣更多工程师就变得更加划算。

If the output curve were flat, companies would naturally cut back on hiring; but when the curve is so steep, companies will only want more people.

item.title: 微软 × 英伟达发布 Surface Laptop Ultra，RTX Spark 塞进 Windows PC
item.guid: 微软-×-英伟达发布-Surface-Laptop-Ultra，RTX-Spark-塞进-Windows-PC
item.description:
Yesterday, Jensen Huang officially unveiled RTX Spark at Computex 2026, a Windows PC superchip for the era of personal AI Agents, featuring 1 petaflop AI performance, up to 128GB of unified memory, and a complete NVIDIA AI and graphics technology stack for local Agents, creation, and gaming. 昨天，黄仁勋在 Computex 2026 上正式发布 RTX Spark，这是一款面向个人 AI Agent 时代的 Windows PC 超级芯片，主打 1 petaflop AI 性能、最高 128GB 统一内存，以及面向本地 Agent、创作和游戏的完整英伟达 AI 与图形技术栈。

The Microsoft Surface team simultaneously unveiled the Surface Laptop Ultra, calling it Surface's first laptop to combine NVIDIA Blackwell RTX GPU, up to 128GB of unified memory, and full CUDA support, capable of running models with up to 120B parameters locally. 微软 Surface 团队同步发布 Surface Laptop Ultra，称这是 Surface 首款结合英伟达 Blackwell RTX GPU、最高 128GB 统一内存和完整 CUDA 支持的笔记本，能在本地运行最高 120B 参数模型。

The device features a 15-inch mini-LED PixelSense Ultra touchscreen, with a peak HDR brightness of up to 2000 nits, and retains HDMI, USB-C, USB-A, SD card, and headphone jacks. 该机采用 15 英寸 mini-LED PixelSense Ultra 触控屏，峰值 HDR 亮度最高 2000 尼特，并保留 HDMI、USB-C、USB-A、SD 卡和耳机接口。

NVIDIA stated that ASUS, Dell, HP, Lenovo, Microsoft, and MSI will launch Windows laptops and small form-factor desktops powered by RTX Spark this autumn, with Acer and Gigabyte to follow. 英伟达表示，华硕、戴尔、惠普、联想、微软和微星将在今年秋季推出搭载 RTX Spark 的 Windows 笔记本和小型台式机产品，宏碁与技嘉后续跟进。

🔗 Related reading: NVIDIA shakes things up, Windows finally welcomes true AI PC 🔗 相关阅读： 英伟达掀桌，Windows 终于迎来真 AI PC

item.title: 2999 元起，华为 nova 16 系列发布
item.guid: 2999-元起，华为-nova-16-系列发布
item.description:
Yesterday, Huawei officially launched the nova 16 series, including three models: nova 16, nova 16 Pro, and nova 16 Ultra, with starting prices of 2999 yuan, 3899 yuan, and 4699 yuan respectively. 昨天，华为正式发布 nova 16 系列，包含 nova 16、nova 16 Pro、nova 16 Ultra 三款型号，起售价分别为 2999 元、3899 元、4699 元。

In terms of configuration, the nova 16 series is equipped with the Kirin 9010S processor and runs HarmonyOS 6.1. The nova 16 Pro and nova 16 Ultra feature a 200-megapixel Hongfeng imaging system, and all models come standard with a 7000mAh battery and 100W super fast charging. 配置方面，nova 16 系列搭载麒麟 9010S 处理器，运行鸿蒙 OS 6.1。nova 16 Pro 与 nova 16 Ultra 配备 2 亿像素红枫影像系统，全系标配 7000mAh 电池及 100W 超级快充。

item.title: 戴尔推出 699 美元 XPS 13，对标 MacBook Neo
item.guid: 戴尔推出-699-美元-XPS-13，对标-MacBook-Neo
item.description:
According to Reuters, Dell recently released the new XPS 13, positioning it as one of its lowest-priced XPS laptops, with a regular starting price of $699 and a back-to-school price for students of $599 (approximately 4000 RMB). 据路透社报道，戴尔近日发布新款 XPS 13，定位为其价格最低的 XPS 笔记本之一，常规起售价 699 美元，面向学生的返校季价格为 599 美元（约合 4000 元人民币）。

This machine focuses on the thin and light touchscreen and entry-level high-end laptop market in the Windows camp. Information disclosed by multiple media outlets shows that the new XPS 13 features a 13.4-inch touchscreen, backlit keyboard, Wi-Fi 7, and a lighter body, targeting users including students and young professionals. 这款机器主打轻薄触屏和 Windows 阵营入门高端本市场。多家媒体披露的信息显示，新 XPS 13 配备 13.4 英寸触控屏、背光键盘、Wi-Fi 7 和更轻机身，目标用户包括学生和年轻专业人群。

Dell released this product after Apple's MacBook Neo, and its price also forms a direct comparison with the MacBook Neo. The latter was released in March this year with a starting price of $599; Dell's current move to lower prices with the XPS brand aims to bring the high-end design language of Windows PCs to a lower price point. 戴尔把这款产品放在苹果 MacBook Neo 之后发布，价格也与 MacBook Neo 形成直接比较。后者今年 3 月发布，起售价 599 美元；戴尔本轮选择用 XPS 品牌下探价格，意在把 Windows PC 的高端设计语言带入更低价位。

item.title: 微星推出「真 · 龙虾电脑」
item.guid: 微星推出「真-·-龙虾电脑」
item.description:
According to Wccftech, MSI officially released the MEG Vision X2 AI+ desktop PC, featuring a holographic AI pet assistant that can voice-control hardware performance and RGB lighting effects. 据 Wccftech 报道，微星（MSI）正式发布 MEG Vision X2 AI+ 台式机，首发搭载可语音控制硬件性能与 RGB 灯效的全息 AI 宠物助手。

The MEG Vision X2 AI+ desktop PC launched by MSI integrates a cylindrical display interface called "AI Holostage" on the front panel of the chassis, with a built-in exclusive holographic AI assistant named "LuckyClaw". 微星此次推出的 MEG Vision X2 AI+ 台式机在机箱前面板集成了一个名为「AI Holostage」的圆柱形显示接口，内置名为「LuckyClaw」的专属全息 AI 助手。

This design transforms the digital companion into a real-time interactive visual entity, allowing users to complete various hardware settings without manually entering underlying software or control centers. 该设计将数字伴侣转化为可实时交互的视觉实体，使用户无需手动进入底层软件或控制中心，即可完成各项硬件设置。

In terms of specific functions, users can issue commands to LuckyClaw to automatically complete PC performance mode switching, RGB lighting system adjustments, and other system-level settings within seconds. 在具体功能上，用户通过向 LuckyClaw 下达指令，可在数秒内自动化完成 PC 性能模式切换、RGB 灯光系统调整及其他系统级设定。

MSI's official statement points out that this is the "next evolution" of intelligent gaming hosts, marking that the application scope of artificial intelligence has transcended simple text dialogue and image generation, officially entering the real-time system-level hardware assisted management stage. 微星官方声明指出，这是智能电竞主机的「下一次进化」，标志着人工智能的应用范围已跨越单纯的文本对话与图像生成，正式进入实时系统级硬件辅助管控阶段。

item.title: 阿里发布多模态智能体模型 Qwen3.7-Plus
item.guid: 阿里发布多模态智能体模型-Qwen3.7-Plus
item.description:
Alibaba officially released its latest multimodal model Qwen3.7-Plus early this morning, positioned as an intelligent agent base that unifies visual and language capabilities, comprehensively expanding visual-language capabilities based on Qwen3.7's text capabilities. 阿里巴巴今日凌晨正式发布最新多模态模型 Qwen3.7-Plus，定位为将视觉与语言能力统一整合的智能体基座，在 Qwen3.7 文本能力的基础上全面扩展视觉-语言能力。

In terms of performance, Alibaba states that Qwen3.7-Plus ranks among the top five globally and first in China on the global visual model list Vision Arena. 在性能表现方面，阿里称 Qwen3.7-Plus 在全球视觉模型榜单 Vision Arena 中跻身全球前五、中国第一。

In terms of pure text capabilities, the model performs strongly on coding agent benchmarks Terminal Bench 2.0, SWE-bench series, and SciCode, and ranks among the top Plus-level models on inference benchmarks GPQA Diamond, HMMT, and IMOAnswerBench, overall approaching Max-level model standards. 纯文本能力方面，该模型在编码智能体基准 Terminal Bench 2.0、SWE-bench 系列和 SciCode 上表现强劲，在推理基准 GPQA Diamond、HMMT 和 IMOAnswerBench 上位于 Plus 级别模型前列，整体接近 Max 级别模型水准。

In terms of multimodality, the model shows significant improvements over its predecessor in GUI agent evaluations such as ScreenSpot Pro, OSWorld-Verified, and AndroidWorld, and also has corresponding enhancements in video understanding tasks like VideoMMMU, MLVU, and multiple driving scenario benchmarks. 多模态方面，模型在 ScreenSpot Pro、OSWorld-Verified 和 AndroidWorld 等 GUI 智能体评测上相比前代有显著提升，在 VideoMMMU、MLVU 等视频理解任务和多项驾驶场景基准上也有对应增强。

item.title: MiniMax M3 发布，支持 100 万上下文
item.guid: MiniMax-M3-发布，支持-100-万上下文
item.description:
MiniMax officially released MiniMax M3 yesterday. The official statement claims that M3 simultaneously possesses three capabilities: Coding, 1 million token context, and native multimodality. The API supports a maximum context window of 1 million tokens and guarantees at least 512K tokens. MiniMax 官方昨日发布 MiniMax M3。官方称，M3 同时具备 Coding、100 万 token 上下文和原生多模态三项能力，API 支持最高 100 万 token 上下文窗口，并保证至少 512K token。

The core architecture of M3 is MiniMax Sparse Attention. The official introduction states that MSA reduces long-context computation costs through sparse attention and KV chunking. With 1 million context, the computation per token is about 1/20 of the previous generation model, with prefilling accelerated by over 9 times and decoding by over 15 times. M3 的核心架构是 MiniMax Sparse Attention。官方介绍称，MSA 通过稀疏注意力和 KV 分块降低长上下文计算成本，在 100 万上下文下，每 token 计算量约为上代模型的 1/20，prefilling 阶段加速超过 9 倍，decoding 阶段加速超过 15 倍。

In terms of model capabilities, the official benchmarks include SWE-Bench Pro 59.0%, Terminal Bench 2.1 66.0%, SWE-fficiency 34.8%, KernelBench Hard 28.8%, and MCP Atlas 74.2%. 模型能力方面，官方给出的基准包括 SWE-Bench Pro 59.0%、Terminal Bench 2.1 66.0%、SWE-fficiency 34.8%、KernelBench Hard 28.8%、MCP Atlas 74.2%。

item.title: 扣子 3.0 上线，多端组建 Agent 团队
item.guid: 扣子-3.0-上线，多端组建-Agent-团队
item.description:
Koko 3.0 officially launched yesterday, with full updates simultaneously across mobile, desktop, and web platforms. The new version expands individual Agent conversations into project spaces: users can create projects, place different Agents and team members into the same task management space, allowing goals, files, process records, and outputs to be consolidated within the same context. 扣子 3.0 昨日正式上线，手机端、电脑端和网页端同步全量更新。新版把单个 Agent 对话扩展为项目空间：用户可以创建项目，把不同 Agent 和团队成员放入同一个任务管理空间，让目标、文件、过程记录和产出沉淀在同一上下文里。

    On web and desktop, Koko 3.0 supports adding Agents, creating projects, and managing tasks;

    On mobile, users can continue to advance tasks or schedule Agents.

The official statement also mentioned that locally running Agents such as Claude Code, Codex CLI, and OpenClaw can be integrated into the Koko project space to process local files within authorized limits; cloud Agents run on Koko's provided cloud computers, catering to long-term online and continuous collaboration scenarios. 官方还提到，本地正在运行的 Claude Code、Codex CLI、OpenClaw 等 Agent 可以接入扣子项目空间，在授权范围内处理本地文件；云端 Agent 则运行在扣子提供的云电脑中，面向长期在线和持续协作场景。

item.title: 新版家用冰箱能效等级国标今日实施
item.guid: 新版家用冰箱能效等级国标今日实施
item.description:
GB 12021.2-2025 "Household Refrigerator Energy Consumption Limit Values and Energy Efficiency Grades," approved and released by the State Administration for Market Regulation and the Standardization Administration of China, officially came into effect this month. This standard is referred to by the industry as the "strictest ever" energy efficiency standard for household refrigerators. 国家市场监督管理总局、国家标准化管理委员会批准发布的 GB 12021.2-2025《家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级》本月起正式实施。该标准被行业称为「史上最严」家用冰箱能效标准。

The new version of the standard includes semiconductor refrigeration household refrigerators and mobile vehicle refrigeration appliances in the product scope, and adjusts the inapplicable product categories; the energy efficiency rating still maintains a 5-level framework, but the requirements for each level have significantly increased, and the evaluation method has shifted from a single indicator to a comprehensive power consumption calculation. 新版标准把半导体制冷家用电冰箱和可移动式车载制冷器具纳入产品范围，并调整了不适用产品类别；能效等级仍保持 5 级框架，但各等级要求明显提高，评价方法从单一指标转向综合耗电量测算。

Xinfei Electric, one of the core drafting units, introduced that the new standard will significantly raise the market entry threshold, estimating that about 20% of low-efficiency products will gradually withdraw from the market due to non-compliance with the new standard. The new regulations will directly affect refrigerator manufacturers' subsequent product inspection, energy efficiency labeling, and channel sales. 核心起草单位之一新飞电器介绍称，新标准会显著提高市场准入门槛，测算约 20% 低效产品将因不符合新标而逐步退出市场。新规会直接影响冰箱厂商后续产品送检、能效标识和渠道销售。

item.title: 深中通道西人工岛将试运营机器人酒店
item.guid: 深中通道西人工岛将试运营机器人酒店
item.description:
According to Shenzhen Release, Shenzhen Culture, Tourism and Industry Development Co., Ltd. has reached a strategic cooperation with a robotics company. The two parties will jointly build a smart hotel with full-process robot services on the West Artificial Island of the Shenzhen-Zhongshan Link, with trial operations planned for early 2027. 据深圳发布消息，深圳市文旅产业发展有限公司与一家机器人公司达成战略合作，双方将在深中通道西人工岛联合打造全流程机器人服务智慧酒店，计划 2027 年初试运营。

The project will be advanced in phases, including scene construction, equipment deployment, system joint debugging, and operational optimization. The hotel plans to cover seven core scenarios: guest reception, luggage guidance, room service, catering delivery, comprehensive cleaning, security patrols, and interactive companionship, providing 24-hour intelligent services and standardized responses. 项目将分阶段推进场景搭建、设备部署、系统联调和运营优化。酒店计划覆盖宾客接待、行李引导、客房服务、餐饮配送、全域清洁、安防巡检和互动陪伴七个核心场景，提供 24 小时智能服务和标准化响应。

item.title: 中国移动联合近 50 家伙伴成立 eSIM 终端生态联盟
item.guid: 中国移动联合近-50-家伙伴成立-eSIM-终端生态联盟
item.description:
According to China Mobile Phone Club news, China Mobile held an eSIM Terminal Ecosystem Cooperation Conference on May 29, uniting with the Telecommunication Terminal Industry Association, GSMA, and nearly 50 core partners from the terminal, chip, platform, and other fields of the industry chain to establish the China Mobile eSIM Terminal Ecosystem Alliance. 据中国移动手机俱乐部消息，中国移动 5 月 29 日召开 eSIM 终端生态合作大会，联合电信终端产业协会、GSMA 以及终端、芯片、平台等领域近 50 家产业链核心合作伙伴，成立中国移动 eSIM 终端生态联盟。

The alliance has established four executive committees for capability support, eSIM technology, terminal innovation, and industry expansion, and simultaneously launched the "X-eSIM Sailing" initiative, focusing on cooperation systems, industrial empowerment, standard implementation, and marketing services. China Mobile also released the "China Mobile New eSIM Card Technical Requirements," providing a unified technical standard for subsequent large-scale implementation. 联盟设立能力支撑、eSIM 技术、终端创新、行业拓展四个执委会，并同步启动「X-eSIM 启航」行动，围绕合作体系、产业赋能、标准落地和营销服务推进。中国移动还公布《中国移动新 eSIM 卡技术要求》，为后续规模化落地提供统一技术口径。

item.title: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》确认引进
item.guid: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》确认引进
item.description:
Marvel and Sony's superhero film "Spider-Man: A Brand New Day" has been confirmed for release in mainland China, with the date yet to be determined. The film will be released globally on the big screen in July 2026, directed by Destin Daniel Cretton, with Tom Holland continuing to play Peter Parker. 漫威与索尼超英电影《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》确认引进内地，档期待定。影片将于 2026 年 7 月全球大银幕上映，由德斯汀·克里顿执导，汤姆·霍兰德继续饰演彼得·帕克。

Official information shows that Zendaya will return as MJ, and Jacob Batalon, Sadie Sink, Liza Colón-Zayas, among others, are also in the main cast. In the trailer, "Punisher Uncle" makes his debut, and villains such as Scorpion, Tarantula, and the Hand will also appear; Jackie Chan revealed that the Jackie Chan Stunt Team will serve as the action directors for the film. 官方信息显示，赞达亚将回归饰演 MJ，雅各布·贝塔隆、萨迪·辛克、莉莎·科伦-扎亚斯等也在主演阵容中。预告片中，「罚叔」首发亮相，蝎子、狼蛛、手合会等反派角色也会登场；成龙透露成家班将担任该片动作导演。

item.title: Charli XCX 新专辑 7 月发行，封面请来斯科塞斯
item.guid: Charli-XCX-新专辑-7-月发行，封面请来斯科塞斯
item.description:
Charli XCX announced her new album "Music, Fashion, Film," scheduled for release in July this year, with director Martin Scorsese appearing on the album cover. Last year, with "Brat," she connected album visuals, party culture, and social media topics into a pop culture event. Charli XCX 公布新专辑《Music, Fashion, Film》，计划今年 7 月发行，专辑封面出现导演 Martin Scorsese。她去年凭借《Brat》把专辑视觉、派对文化和社交媒体话题连成一次流行文化事件。

The new album title directly juxtaposes music, fashion, and film, continuing Charli XCX's approach of treating pop music as a cross-media project. Scorsese's appearance on the cover expands this release from music news to the film culture circle. 新专辑标题直接把音乐、时尚和电影并列，也延续了 Charli XCX 把流行音乐当成跨媒介项目经营的方式。Scorsese 出现在封面上，则让这次发布从音乐新闻扩展到电影文化圈层。

item.title: 《亢奋》第三季确认完结
item.guid: 《亢奋》第三季确认完结
item.description:
HBO confirms that "Euphoria" will officially conclude with its third season. Variety reported that the show spanned seven years, totaling three seasons and 26 episodes, and after the third season finale airs, HBO has confirmed it will not continue production for a fourth season. HBO 确认，《亢奋》将在第三季正式完结。Variety 报道称，这部剧历时七年，共三季 26 集，第三季大结局播出后，HBO 确认不再继续制作第四季。

"Euphoria" premiered in 2019, created by Sam Levinson and starring Zendaya. The series revolves around the addiction, identity, family, and intimate relationships of a group of American high school students, becoming one of HBO's most recognizable youth dramas in recent years due thanks to its strong visual style and use of music. 《亢奋》2019 年首播，由 Sam Levinson 创作，Zendaya 主演。剧集围绕一群美国高中生的成瘾、身份、家庭和亲密关系展开，凭借强烈影像风格和音乐使用成为 HBO 近年最具辨识度的青年剧之一。
